description: Letter from Moshe b. Abidirham. In Hebrew. Dating: Second half of the 16th century. Concerning philanthropic activities for the benefit of the rabbis of Egypt. Mentions R. Yiṣḥaq Saruq, R. Yiṣḥaq Karo, R. Yaʿaqov b. Tibbon, R. Yaʿaqov Kastro, and Avraham Kolon (the sender of ENA 2727.45, Moss. IV,93, and HUC 1034). See Avraham David's edition on FGP for identifications of several of these men.
